'''chapunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yaguarundi|yaguarundi]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-p-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yaguarundi|yaguarundi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chapunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæpinith|chæpinith]] || [[word:chæpinij|chæpinij]] || [[word:chæpinish|chæpinish]] || [[word:chæpini|chæpini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chapupunuth|chapupunuth]] || [[word:chapupunuj|chapupunuj]] || [[word:chapupunush|chapupunush]] || [[word:chapupunu|chapupunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chapunuth|chapunuth]] || [[word:chapunuj|chapunuj]] || [[word:chapunush|chapunush]] || [[word:chapunu|chapunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chapufnuth|chapufnuth]] || [[word:chapufnuj|chapufnuj]] || [[word:chapufnush|chapufnush]] || [[word:chapufnuf|chapufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chapunuthu|chapunuthu]] || [[word:chapunuju|chapunuju]] || [[word:chapunushu|chapunushu]] || [[word:chapunuku|chapunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chapunuth|chapunuth]] || [[word:chapunuj|chapunuj]] || [[word:chapunush|chapunush]] || [[word:chapunu|chapunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chapunuthul|chapunuthul]] || [[word:chapunujul|chapunujul]] || [[word:chapunushul|chapunushul]] || [[word:chapunukul|chapunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chapunuthuthu|chapunuthuthu]] || [[word:chapunujuju|chapunujuju]] || [[word:chapunushushu|chapunushushu]] || [[word:chapunuku|chapunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chapunuthun|chapunuthun]] || [[word:chapunujun|chapunujun]] || [[word:chapunushun|chapunushun]] || [[word:chapunukun|chapunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chapunuthuoro|chapunuthuoro]] || [[word:chapunujuoro|chapunujuoro]] || [[word:chapunushuoro|chapunushuoro]] || [[word:chapunukuoro|chapunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
